title: Thunderchild
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
The '''''Thunderchild''''' was a [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|''Nebulon-B'' escort frigate]] in service to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It was part of a task force commanded by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]] during the [[Battle of Ciutric]].

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]]''
